text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up early one morning while it's still dark
out. I'm finding it hard to get back to sleep, so I
decide to take a walk instead.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
...Oh. You're one of the academy's trainers. What
are you doing up this early?
choice_data_list: I should be asking you that.
I should be asking you that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Why, I'm on a walk! It was such a pleasant night.
choice_data_list:
You do know it's against academy rules to be
out at this time?

You do know it's against academy rules to be
out at this time?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Of course I know.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I only meant to take in the fresh night air for a
second before heading back.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But... look down this road. You see how far down
the streetlamps go? They're like a series of
guideposts.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I started to wonder where they led and what
would happen if I followed them to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
So, there I was, counting the lights as I went. The
sky was vast and silent. It was beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
There might have been a meteor shower,
actually... I saw so many shooting stars flying past
above the dark town. Then suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
My stomach growled something fierce! My feet
hurt, and it was already morning. So I made my
way back, and you spotted me! Hahaha!
choice_data_list: So you've been out all night?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Let's keep that a secret between us. Getting scolded is so boring.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, enough talk. I could really go for some
breakfast right now.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, would you like to come with? Since fate has
already brought us together, I'd love to hear what
prompted you to wake up so early.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That diner over there does a really mean egg over
rice dish for breakfast.
choice_data_list: Persuade her to head back and sleep.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Head back and sleep? You sound like Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The last time I spent all night out, I got lectured
for almost a whole hour in the student council
office.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ugh... That was the most boring thing ever. I just can't. Even thinking about it is making me—yawn...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I think I'll... go over there for just a little...
Good night...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: All right. Come on, then!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You were out for a walk because you
couldn't fall back asleep? Guess we both have a
long and drowsy day ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But you know, now that my belly's warm and full, I
feel kind of...
